focus: Final CocoIndex-to-CodeGraph bridge contradiction check and architecture packet success criteria
keyFindings: No automatic CocoIndex search to Code Graph context bridge was found; the current live bridge is explicit seed input to code_graph_context.
CocoIndex fork telemetry exists in QueryResult and implementation-intent reranking, but context.ts, seed-resolver.ts, and codeGraphSeedSchema drop raw_score, path_class, and rankingSignals.
Recommended Q-OPP first packet is additive seed-fidelity metadata passthrough, not mcp_server/lib/search reranking.
Search-pipeline reranking should remain rejected until CocoIndex rows become PipelineRows and measured evidence supports Stage 3 score use.
Q-ARCH should close as two bounded packets: authority token vs recovered context, and specialist telemetry vs composed retrieval ranking.
